features.description: Base multi-party approval engine. Always on for every tier. Every action decorated with #[AsApprovableAction] routes through the engine when a template matches.

Tenants can author their own approval templates via the workflow-approval-templates surface. Small-tier tenants use the platform-shipped defaults (seeded on tenant provisioning). Medium+ tier unlocks custom authoring.
Access to advanced selector functions: manager_of, except, chain_up_to. Basic selectors (role, user, permission, owner_of, any, all) available to all tiers with custom templates.
Generate cross-tenant approval-flow snapshots as SOC 2 CC6.3 + ISO 27001 A.9.2 evidence. Requires enterprise tier + compliance module co-active.
Approver selectors automatically substitute delegates for OOF delegators. Reads access/delegation::role_delegations. Off = approvers on OOF still receive notifications (no OOF handoff).

template.on_timeout='escalate' unlocks a second-tier approver pool via template.escalation_selector when the primary approvers don't decide in time. Deferred to Wave 2 — Wave 1b ships expire + approve only.
features.notes: Blueprint declares the feature for forward-compat; the engine does not yet implement it.

features.description: Bulk-import approval templates from a shipped catalogue OR export a tenant's templates as a JSON blob for backup + migration. Deferred to Wave 2.
Dashboard showing each approver's decision timeliness, approve/reject ratios, average time-to-decision. Deferred to Wave 2 pending privacy review.
